# Nuralim Portfolio Project - Next.js

## Project Overview
Building a professional single-page portfolio website in Indonesian language for Nuralim, showcasing 6+ years of software engineering experience.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS with custom color palette
- shadcn/ui components
- framer-motion for animations
- lucide-react for icons
- next-themes for dark mode

## Branding & Style
- **Mood**: Premium, trustworthy, professional
- **Primary Color**: #0A84FF
- **Accent Color**: #00C2A8
- **Dark Color**: #0B1220
- **Muted Gray**: #E2E8F0
- **Typography**: Bold headings, comfortable body text

## Page Structure
1. Header (Sticky) - Logo, Navigation, CTA "Hire Me"
2. Hero - Headline, Subheadline, CTA buttons, Tech badges
3. About - Personal story, key metrics
4. Skills - Tech stack badges grid
5. Experience - Timeline cards
6. Projects - Grid with case study modals
7. Education - Cards
8. Interests - Badges
9. Contact - Form + WhatsApp CTA
10. Footer - Social links, copyright

## Content Language
All content in Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)

## Development Guidelines
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Accessibility (semantic HTML, ARIA labels, focus rings)
- SEO optimization (OpenGraph, Twitter Cards, schema.org)
- Lighthouse score target: ≥ 90
- Clean Architecture & SOLID principles
